ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "epa_id" TEXT /* EPA ID for the site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the site is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the site is located */,
  "fips" REAL /* FIPS code for the site */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the site is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code for the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use of the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, proposed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the site type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., inspection, enforcement action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of permit (e.g., air quality, water quality) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the permit expires */,
  "permit_status" TEXT /* Status of the permit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_waste" (
  "waste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of hazardous waste */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of hazardous waste */,
  "disposal_method" TEXT /* Method of disposal */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the waste is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_waste_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement action */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the enforcement action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of enforcement action (e.g., fine, penalty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enforcement action */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enforcement_actions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, inspector, scientist) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_types_site" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits_site" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_waste_site" (
  "waste_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hazardous waste */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_id", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_contacts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., permit, inspection report) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_checklist" (
  "checklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checklist item */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection */,
  "item" TEXT /* Checklist item */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the checklist item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_checklist_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of enforcement action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enforcement action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_type_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of site type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
